common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this API to create Manual Selection Product Ads

request_params.description: A random string used to prevent duplicate ads. If an ads is created successfully, subsequent request using the same reference id will fail
request_params.name: reference_id

request_params.description: The budget set for the Auto Product Ads
request_params.name: budget

request_params.description: the start date per campaign. please kindly note that if you want to set unlimited date, you can just pass today's date as the start date
request_params.name: start_date

request_params.description: the end date of each campaign. please kindly note that if you want to set an unlimited campaign, you can keep empty for the end date field
request_params.name: end_date

request_params.description: the ROAS target for each campaign with auto bidding. If 0, GMV Max / ROI feature is not enabled
request_params.name: roas_target

request_params.description: selected keywords, required for manual bidding mode
request_params.name: selected_keywords

request_params.description: the location settings for manual bidding method
request_params.name: discovery_ads_locations

request_params.description: Whether to use default or set on/off Smart Creative for this ad. Supported Values: "", "default", "on", "off". Empty string treated as default.
request_params.name: smart_creative_setting

response_params.description: Error code, empty when no error returned
response_params.name: error

response_params.description: If some data cannot respond normally, set the warning
response_params.name: warning

response_params.description: request id is unique for each request
response_params.name: request_id

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.test.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/ads/create_manual_product_ads?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "bidding_method": "auto",
    "budget": 10.5,
    "discovery_ads_locations": [
        {
            "bid_price": 10.5,
            "location": "daily_discover"
        }
    ],
    "end_date": "-",
    "enhanced_cpc": true,
    "item_id": 111222,
    "reference_id": "asdf-1234-qwerty",
    "roas_target": 1.2,
    "selected_keywords": [
        {
            "bid_price_per_click": 11.2,
            "keyword": "apple",
            "match_type": "exact"
        }
    ],
    "smart_creative_setting": false,
    "start_date": "11-11-2023"
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;
